mapper.select:
select * from t_operator a
where a.zid=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_operator ( zid, zcode, zname, zpassword, zqyid, zqymc, zrole, zxszd )values( #{zid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zpassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zqyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zqymc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zrole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zxszd,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
